cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Shreya Chakraborty? Sir, I need to speak with you about some information.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? What information? Spit it out, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We have information about your, ah, business dealings. Let's just say they're not entirely above board, if you know what I mean.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What are you talking about? I don't have any illegal business dealings. This is nonsense.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Don't play dumb, Shreya ji. We have evidence. Unless you cooperate, we'll have to take this to the Income Tax Department.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Cooperate? What do you want? Stop wasting my time.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We want... a small donation, let's call it, to make this problem go away. Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You're trying to extort me? I'll report you to the authorities. Haan, I will.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I wouldn't do that if I were you, Shreya. We have enough to make your life very difficult.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm not afraid of you. I'll call Bank of Baroda's fraud department right now.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 90s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A scammer calls claiming to have damaging information about the victim's "illegal business dealings" (which are entirely fabricated). They threaten to report this information to the Income Tax Department unless the victim pays them to stay silent.
